items.name: FLAK2 T-INH "Taurus" Helmet (Black)
items.description:
The T-INH, Transfer - Independent Neurological Habitat helmets, so-called "Taurus" for the winged protrusions from both sides of the helmet, are a medical and scientific breakthrough for military application. An engram of the patient's mind-- such as a soldier who's physical form is beyond saving --can be slotted into the device, giving them a new lease on life. A full return to function can be accomplished in as little as two weeks of vigorous mental rehabilitation and exercises, and operators on average return to field duties within six weeks.

Browse the full set: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=FLAK2&Category=1&CreatorName=FirstSight+UGC&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3

items.name: Winged Helmet of the Bronze Knight
items.description:
A remarkable accessory that embodies the essence of a valiant warrior. This closed knights helmet features a sturdy visor, providing excellent protection on the battlefield. Adorning the sides of the helmet are striking bronze wings, meticulously crafted from bronze.

Resembling a fusion of a Valkyria helmet and a traditional closed knights helmet, this accessory exudes both strength and elegance. Feel the spirit of the Bronze Knight awaken within you. The resplendent bronze wings on either side stand as a testament to your indomitable courage and unwavering honor, soaring with valor on every quest and adventure you embark upon.

Embrace the spirit of the Bronze Knight and conquer the virtual realms of your favorite games with the Winged Helmet of the Bronze Knight. Let its majestic design and unwavering protection inspire you to become a legendary warrior.
